05
Content Management System
CMS vendor and subscription term
A CMS lets you remotely push content updates, schedule playlists, and monitor displays. If unsure, pick No — you can always add CMS later.
For ≤25 player deployments on Local network, CMS is optional. >25 players or Cloud deployments require CMS.
Recommended: BrightSign CMS (native ecosystem)
How long the CMS license is paid up-front for.
Billing structure: Vendor and term captured — line items appear in BOM

Merge Customers

The SOURCE customer will be merged INTO the target. The source name will be added as an alias on the target, all deal entries for the source customer will be reassigned to the target, and the source customer will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
